title: Largest countries in South America, by total area - Statista
content: Brazil is the largest country by far, with a total area of over 8.5 million square kilometers, followed by Argentina, with almost 2.8 million square kilometers.

title: What is the second largest country in South America by land area?
content: Argentina is the second largest country in South America having a land area of approximately 2.78 million square kilometers.

title: List of South American countries by area - Wikipedia
content: Below is a list of countries and dependencies in South America by area. Brazil is the largest country in South America while Suriname is the smallest.

content: # The Largest Countries In South America.
